---
title: "pca_transform"
generated: true
description: "Project `X` onto a PCA basis: `(X - mean) @ components.T`."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.pca`](../nitrix-stats-pca.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:pca_transform -->
```python
pca_transform(X: Float[Array, 'n d'], components: Float[Array, 'k d'], mean: Float[Array, 'd']) -> Float[Array, 'n k']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:pca_transform -->
Project `X` onto a PCA basis: `(X - mean) @ components.T`.

Centres `X` by `mean` and projects onto the rows of
`components` to obtain the principal-component coordinates.  Takes
`components` and `mean` explicitly (rather than a
`PCAResult`) so a pre-fitted basis -- e.g. components loaded
from elsewhere -- can be applied without a local `pca_fit`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:pca_transform -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `X` | `Float` | `n` × `d` | — | `(n, d)` data matrix (rows = samples, columns = features). |
| `components` | `Float` | `k` × `d` | — | `(k, d)` orthonormal basis, row `i` the `i`-th principal axis. |
| `mean` | `Float` | `d` | — | `(d,)` feature mean subtracted before projection. |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `n` × `k`. `(n, k)` coordinates of each sample in the principal-component basis.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:pca_transform -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
| `d` | spatial dimension (2 or 3) |
| `k` | kernel or basis components |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
